code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Opened: Issue created
    
    Opened --> Triage: Auto-added to project
    
    Triage --> Todo: Accepted & prioritized
    Triage --> Closed: Rejected / Duplicate
    Triage --> NeedsInfo: More information needed
    
    NeedsInfo --> Triage: Information provided
    NeedsInfo --> Closed: No response
    
    Todo --> InProgress: Work started
    
    InProgress --> InReview: PR opened
    InProgress --> Blocked: Dependencies / Issues
    InProgress --> Todo: Paused / Deprioritized
    
    Blocked --> InProgress: Unblocked
    Blocked --> Todo: Alternative approach
    
    InReview --> InProgress: Changes requested
    InReview --> Done: PR merged
    
    Done --> [*]: Issue closed
    Closed --> [*]
    
    note right of Opened
        Labels applied:
        - Type (bug/feature/task)
        - Area (ci/docs/etc)
    end note
    
    note right of Triage
        Platform/Owner reviews:
        - Is it valid?
        - What's the priority?
        - Who should work on it?
    end note
    
    note right of Todo
        Work is planned:
        - Priority: P0-P3
        - Effort: XS-XL
        - Owner Team assigned
    end note
    
    note right of InProgress
        Active development:
        - Branch created
        - Commits happening
        - Regular updates
    end note
    
    note right of InReview
        PR review:
        - CODEOWNERS review
        - CI checks passing
        - Approvals required
    end note
    
    note right of Done
        Completed:
        - PR merged
        - Changes deployed
        - Issue auto-closed
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个Issue生命周期的状态图，从创建到最终关闭的完整流程。起点应该是Issue被创建，然后进入Triage阶段，由平台负责人评审。
明白了，Triage之后有哪些分支？是直接进入开发，还是有可能被拒绝？
Triage有三种出口：接受并确定优先级后进入Todo；如果是重复Issue或不符合规范就直接Closed；还有一种常见情况是需要补充信息，这时候进入NeedsInfo状态。
好的，我先把主线画出来。从Todo到InProgress是开发开始，然后到InReview进行PR评审。不过InProgress这里应该有些特殊流转吧？
对，InProgress要能回到Todo表示暂停或降级，也要能到Blocked表示被依赖项卡住。Blocked解封后回到InProgress，如果换方案就回Todo。
InReview到Done是PR合并，但如果评审不通过就回到InProgress修改，这个理解对吗？
没错。另外NeedsInfo如果一直没回复也要能关闭。每个状态我希望能加注释说明关键活动，比如Opened时要打标签区分bug/feature/task和area。
我来补充注释：Triage写平台评审的三个问题，Todo写优先级P0-P3和effort评估，InProgress写分支创建和提交活动，InReview写CODEOWNERS和CI检查，Done写部署和自动关闭。
等等，NeedsInfo到Triage的箭头方向我刚才说反了，应该是信息补充后回到Triage重新评审，不是单向出去。
已修正，NeedsInfo双向连接Triage。现在Done和Closed都指向终点，整个生命周期完整了。
